papers.title: VALLR: Visual ASR Language Model for Lip Reading
papers.use: Evaluate a phoneme-CTC visual front end followed by a language model.

papers.title: LipVoicer: Generating Speech from Silent Videos Guided by Lip Reading
papers.use: Possible speech reconstruction after recognition; not a recognizer baseline.

papers.title: Lip Reading for Low-resource Languages by Learning and Combining General Speech Knowledge and Language-specific Knowledge
papers.use: Separate transferable visual speech units from language-specific decoding.

papers.title: Lip reading using external viseme decoding
papers.use: Compare a video-to-viseme front end plus external viseme-to-text decoder.

papers.title: Synchronous Bidirectional Learning for Multilingual Lip Reading
papers.use: Evaluate phoneme units and cross-language visual sharing.

papers.title: Pseudo-Convolutional Policy Gradient for Sequence-to-Sequence Lip-Reading
papers.use: Reference for sequence-level objectives closer to WER than token cross-entropy.

papers.title: Lips Are Lying: Spotting the Temporal Inconsistency between Audio and Visual in Lip-Syncing DeepFakes
papers.use: Potential synchronization/integrity diagnostics; not visual-only transcription.

papers.title: Hearing Lips: Improving Lip Reading by Distilling Speech Recognizers
papers.use: Evaluate cross-modal distillation from an audio speech-recognition teacher.

papers.title: A Lip Sync Expert Is All You Need for Speech to Lip Generation In The Wild
papers.use: Possible synchronization metric or augmentation research; task direction is opposite.

papers.title: LipNet: End-to-End Sentence-level Lipreading
papers.use: Historical sentence-level CTC baseline and terminology.

papers.title: NaturalL2S: End-to-End High-quality Multispeaker Lip-to-Speech Synthesis with Differential Digital Signal Processing
papers.use: Future natural speech synthesis from lips; not text recognition.

papers.title: Chinese-LiPS: A Chinese audio-visual speech recognition dataset with Lip-reading and Presentation Slides
papers.use: Reference for Chinese AVSR and contextual slide information.

papers.title: LASER: Lip Landmark Assisted Speaker Detection for Robustness
papers.use: Potential multi-face speaker selection and landmark robustness.

papers.title: Enhancing Lip Reading with Multi-Scale Video and Multi-Encoder
papers.use: Evaluate multi-scale video and Branchformer-family encoder ensembles.

papers.title: On the Audio-visual Synchronization for Lip-to-Speech Synthesis
papers.use: Synchronization QA if Open-Altergo later reconstructs speech.

papers.title: SwinLip: An Efficient Visual Speech Encoder for Lip Reading Using Swin Transformer
papers.use: Evaluate a more efficient visual encoder and possible on-device path.

papers.title: Efficient Audio-Visual Speech Separation with Discrete Lip Semantics and Multi-Scale Global-Local Attention
papers.use: Reference for discrete visual speech semantics; primary task requires audio.

papers.title: VSRo-200: A Romanian Visual Speech Recognition Dataset for Studying Supervision and Multimodal Robustness
papers.use: Reproduce pseudo-label scaling, speaker/OOD evaluation, and isolated-word transfer methodology without treating Romanian artifacts as an English backend.

papers.title: Auto-AVSR: Audio-Visual Speech Recognition with Automatic Labels
papers.use: Freeze the architecture, preprocessing, tokenizer, decoder, and automatic-label baseline underlying the current and LRS3 candidate backends.
